entry.title: Unable to release repair confirmation for billing
entry.content:
When I try to release a repair confirmation for billing via the Manage Inhouise-repairs: Prepare for Billing app, the system issues error message A billing document request has not been created for at least one item.

The application log shows that the error message detail as:

Message No. CRMS4_REPAIR_RAP014

Message Type__________ E (Error)
Message Class_________ CRMS4_REPAIR_RAP (Messages for In-House Repair RAP)
Message Number________ 014

 

However, I am able to release the same confirmation via the normal Release for billing app under Service operations. This then also removed the transaction from the Prepare for billing app, and the billing request document shows under the Transaction history of the Repair object.

I am unable to determine why the release is not possible via the Inhouse-repair app. 

The transaction that I am billing has item category SVCM and transaction type REPC

The config in IMG for Assign Service Transaction Types to Billing Document Request Types is the same comparing REPC and SRVC.

Would appreciate guidance on possible cause. I am using On-Prem implementation.

Thank you.

entry.title: Unveiling the Future of Business Process Management with SAP Signavio
entry.content:
In "SAP Signavio: Next Generation Business Process Management," Chet Harter delves into the transformative power of integrating SAP Signavio for enhancing business efficiency and agility. This talk emphasizes the necessity of speed, the integration of diverse perspectives for innovation, and the pivotal role of continuous improvement in business processes. Harter champions the use of data-driven insights and advanced visibility tools like SAP Signavio to reduce uncertainty and make informed decisions, thereby enabling organizations to anticipate challenges and capitalize on opportunities.

Chet also underscores the importance of fostering a collaborative culture between IT and business teams to align strategies and achieve shared objectives. Through actionable recommendations, Harter guides businesses towards adopting a proactive, informed, and collaborative approach to navigating the complexities of modern business environments, ultimately advocating for a culture that prioritizes continuous improvement and strategic use of technology to drive success.

Main Recommendations

  • Embrace Speed and Efficiency: Harter encourages the audience to prioritize speed and efficiency in their operations, mirroring SAP's emphasis on these qualities. He suggests that organizations should seek ways to proactively identify and solve potential issues in their business processes, using tools like SAP Signavio to anticipate and address problems before they escalate.
  • Integrate Diverse Perspectives for Innovation: Following the acquisition of Signavio by SAP, Harter highlights the importance of merging different cultures and expertise. He recommends that organizations should embrace the diversity of perspectives that comes from such integrations, as this can lead to innovation and improved business process management.
  • Commit to Continuous Improvement: Harter stresses the importance of continuous improvement in business processes. He advises organizations to always be on the lookout for ways to enhance their operations, leveraging tools and methodologies that promote awareness, collaboration, and standardization.
  • Reduce Uncertainty with Enhanced Visibility: To make informed decisions, Harter recommends reducing uncertainty by improving visibility into business processes and vulnerabilities. Tools like SAP Signavio can provide the necessary insights into performance and potential areas for improvement, thus enabling better strategic planning.
  • Effectively Manage Business Processes and Change: Managing business processes and change is critical, according to Harter. He suggests that organizations should adopt structured approaches to manage these aspects effectively, recognizing the challenges and embracing the opportunities that come with transitions like SAP S/4HANA implementations.
  • Leverage Data for Insights and Improvement: Harter advises the use of data-driven insights to identify and prioritize areas for improvement. By analyzing current systems and processes, organizations can make informed decisions and implement changes that yield significant benefits.
  • Foster Collaboration Between IT and Business: The speaker underscores the importance of collaboration and communication between IT and business communities. He recommends developing a common language and shared goals to ensure that both groups work towards the same objectives, thereby enhancing the effectiveness of process management and organizational change.
  • Cultivate a Continuous Improvement Culture: Lastly, Harter advocates for building a culture that continuously seeks improvement. He suggests making organizational change management a core competency and utilizing platforms like SAP Signavio to support ongoing enhancements.

Remember:

“Uncertainty stifles business leaders on how to continuously improve; uncertainty about what to do and uncertainty about how to do it.  We need to tap the power of new technologies like GenAI to reduce uncertainty in order to move forward intelligently and confidently.” Chet Harter

Access Presentation: Here         

 Watch the YouTube Video of Chet's Presentation: Here  

 

CTA
For Enterprise Architect SAP Community Updates and More: Connect with and Follow Paul Kurchina - https://www.linkedin.com/in/paulkurchina/

entry.title: Re: Cutover Tips (Focusing on Finance Scope)
entry.content: Which table or report can be used to extract data from SAP legacy system for preparing file for G/L Balances / G/L Open Items?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
Hi @kenneth_dalvik ,

Well, this is an exact suggestion we would imagine from SAP as the "end-users" in a wider sense

I tend to agree with the need of embrasing changes and do not want to feel as a man from a prehistorical cave.. BUT 🙂

I also do agree with @MKreitlein when he is listing the whole previous history of SAP data and analytics solutions

if you ask the vast majority of your business users - what is required NOW for their productive work? None of them will mention "hey, let's forget about  ----> thousands of queries, also many two-structure queries, with extensive logic in it. Ten thousands of lines of Customer Exit variable code, for hundreds of CE variables <--- also thousands of hours of data rules creation, validation and polishing the solutions as well as company adoption of those reporting solutions

The existing customers ideally would love to get a minimal disruption in their BAU - though also get a dozed pinch of new tools/technologies/approaches.

But it seems that SAP really (again) tend to push people into this direction with fancy things 

Maybe I'm young and blind, but if you try to convince business people in this "no AI, no Co-pilot, no SAC planning models, no Data marketplace, no Data democratization, no Data Fabric"  -- the answer would be "aaaand, what is the problem really?"

Unfortunately, SAP haven't sold this idea of moving to SAP Datasphere to technical people, consultants and partners - so they can not promote this tool to the end business users. 

Good to have SAP Datasphere as "another" Data ana Analytics platfrom - yes! To start some PoC, trials there - yes, for sure. Start showcasing them to business people - also, a bold yes!

But it's a very long way ahead of each company, indeed 🙂 

And here I'm not even talking about licenses, support, storage, resource consumption and performance of the live/stored data reports 😉

Regards,

Valery

entry.title: Re: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Introducing the Leading Note for Peru [EN]
entry.content:
Hi, 

I would like to know why SAP does not cover the Cash and Banks Ledgers (010100 and 010200).

These ledgers are statutory reporting requirements in Peru.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: C4C Server side Integration with Microsoft Outlook

Thanks! @Ralf_Kammerer 

All links are broken though 😕

Cheers! ^_^

entry.title: SAC Currency Conversion Rate from previous Month (Priorities of Calculations)
entry.content:
Hello community, 

is it possible to rearrange the priorities of Lookups and Currency Conversions? 

I need to derive the monthly changes (Credit/Debit) from a aggregated value (Balance) delivered by the source in local currency. The basic Idea is to lookup the value from the previous month and subtract it from the current month. This works fine for Local currency with the Formula:

 

Value Previous Month = LOOKUP([Value], [d/Date] =Current("Year").Previous("Month", 1))

But when it comes to currency conversions, the lookup delivers the already converted EUR-value from the previous month (which is based on the conversion rate from the previous month). ==> See Screenshot "Current Behaviour"

What i would need as a result is the Value in LC from the previous month converted in EUR with the conversion rate of the current month. ==> See Screenshot "Needed Solution"

 

I think this is a questions of priorities of calculations. Currently the Currency Conversion is performed before the lookup. Is there a way to do it the other way around and do the lookup before the currency conversion?

Can anyone support here?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
Hello @kenneth_dalvik.

I do not agree at all, at least for medium and large projects (which is where the migration to BW4 can be more complex).

The customization and power of the processes that we can create in BW are far away from what can be done in DSP today.

Load management, error control, use of programming, use of parameters, possibility of running UPDATES, dynamic partitions, data tiering, etc, are functionalities that in DSP are either not supported or are supported in a very limited way.
If this already happens when comparing HANA Cloud with Datasphere, the gap widens when comparing BW with Datasphere when creating datawarehouses.

I just hope that the product team is aware of this (beyond the "marketing" vision), and that work continues on bringing DSP to a similar level of functionality as BW and HANA.

The success in the implementation of projects and also in their maintenance depends on it.

entry.title: Re: Get logged in user data in SAP Work Zone
entry.content:
In any controller Init function you can call below code : 

 

this.getOwnerComponent().oComponentData._sapUiIntegration_card.getHostInstance().getContextValue("sap.workzone/currentUser/email").then(function(value){console.log(value)})

apologies for any typo.

April 18th at 10:30 am CET

https://ibm.biz/SAP_on_Power

entry.title: For more clarity
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Thank u for this deep explanation, I need more clarity on some areas

  • 5: Entry type
    • "q" = DDIC structure RSAUENTR2 version 1 without field SLGLTRM2
    • "2" = DDIC structure RSAUENTR2 version 2 including field SLGLTRM2
    • "5" = variable length record
  • you have mentioned 5 as a variable length.. which length does it holds?? bcoz i m clear with other things like length of user+username

what is 0000 - length of ?? + ?? . This u have mentioned.. what is the meaning of that?

And in this doc, https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/analysis-and-recommended-settings-of...

every field has a defined length ,but u have here described with variable lengths, does this occurs in the latest version of sap?? Bcoz in this doc,its mentioned as

variable message has 64 bits,program has 40 like that.. and follows an order.. and here is there any order.. if possible can u provide a table like this.. so that i would be more helpful

FieldSub-fieldLengthDescription

SLGTYPE  SysLog: LIKE structure RSLGETYP
 SLGFTYP1Entry type: "q" = version 1 without field SLGLTRM2, "2" = version 2 including field SLGLTRM2
 AREA2Message area
 SUBID1Message name
SLGDATTIM  Time stamp (CHAR 16)
 DATE8Date in format YYYYMMDD
 TIME6Time in format hhmmss
 DUMMY2not used
SLGPROC  SysLog: LIKE RSLGPID structure
 UNIXPID5Process ID
 TASKTNO5Task
 SLGTTYP2Process type (short form)
SLGLTRM 8Terminal name (truncated)
SLGUSER 12User name
SLGTC 20Transaction
SLGREPNA 40Program
SLGMAND 3Client
SLGMODE 1External mode of an SAP dialog
SLGDATA 64Variable message data
SLGLTRM2 20Terminal name (continued), only available if SLGFTYP=2

entry.title: SAP Signavio Process Navigator does not show Best Practices for On-Prem in Solution Scenarios
entry.content:
Hello All,

we´ve recognized that SAP Signavio Process Navigator is not showing solution scenarios for S/4 HANA On-Premise 2022 and 2023.

It is only available to see solution scenario for Private Cloud but not On-Premise.

In the past it was possible to see also On-Premise solution scenarios.

Could you please let me know if anything was changed here? Are the solution scenarios for Private Cloud identical to On-Premise?

I am looking forward for your answers.

Best regards,

Oliver

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Datasphere
entry.content:
I thought about what you said about posting and editing, but I thought that the user would receive an email notifying a reply with the initial text, before the subsequent edit. But yes, it is a trick that works.

Good research, again work for us to discover these groups and make decisions on things that are not ours. I see it complicated to push that group if SAP doesn't do it, by putting links on the DSP product website, or on the DSP itself.

entry.title: Pilot: SAP Datasphere Fundamentals
entry.content:
This May 2024, tentatively the week of May 13th, we will pilot a new Expert Guided Implementation (EGI) on SAP Datasphere Fundamentals as part of the SAP Enterprise Support advisory council . 

The SAP Enterprise Support advisory council provides immense value by bringing together a select group of customers to collaborate with SAP experts and provide valuable insights and feedback on the development, improvement, and optimization of the SAP Enterprise Support program. Through this collaboration, members have the opportunity to influence SAP's support offerings, gain early access to new tools and resources, and actively shape the future direction of SAP's support solutions. 

 

A reminder that in Q4 2023 we introduced the new EGI: Plan your Conversion to SAP Datasphere with BW Bridge, or SAP BW/4HANA. 

In our new planned EGI we would like to provide you with a concrete understanding of the use cases for SAP Datasphere, and take you through the important features, with the help of expert lead guidance that will be provided to you, so that you can see quicker time to value when starting your own project.
You will receive a comprehensive deep dive into SAP Datasphere including the more technical aspects such as system readiness and connectivity options, data provisioning and replication, and much more.

Prerequisites

The only prerequisites for joining is that you have an active project where you are evaluating use cases for SAP Datasphere in your system environment. We will cover some topics which will be relevant to customers coming from an SAP BW on-premise perspective but mostly the topics covered will be agnostic to your wider SAP landscape if any.
Having an SAP Datasphere tenant would be an advantage. Even just a trial system or an active subscription. But this is not mandatory for participation

Agenda

This pilot sessions will be brought to you in 4 x 2 hour sessions.
Topics covered include:

  • Insights on system readiness, installation and set up of connectivity options, and data integration
  • Data democratization with tightly integrated SAP analytics solutions
  • Data modelling – we will look at the data layer / business layer, modelling, and model transfer from SAP BW/4HANA
  • Data Provisioning and Replication
  • Space and Usage management
  • Authorizations
  • We will take a look at the SAP HANA Database Explorer, and much more


Our aim is that through the course of these enablement sessions we will help you understand key concepts and see quicker time to value when adopting SAP Datasphere.

If you would like to view this and our other ESAC workstreams please visit: SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council.
To express interest in this workstream on SAP Datasphere Fundamentals please email esac@sap.com

 

Further Support and Empowerment via SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps

Compliment your EGI experience by joining the SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps.
We are providing continued support and collaboration after the EGI workshops have completed, along with further enablement materials such as best practice documents and webinars.
This is a great way for you to get access to these services, along with further support and empowerment for SAP Data and Analytics solutions.

Join the SAP Analytics Solutions value map to receive further assistance, as well as access to a dedicated learning journey on SAP Data Warehousing topics.
* S user required

 

 

 

 

 

 

Quicklinks

  • SAP Analytics Cloud: Continuous Quality Checks
  • Practical Guide: How to build SAP Analytics Cloud stories using SAP Datasphere
  • E-Learning series: SAP Datasphere Connectivity
  • Plan your Conversion to SAP Datasphere with BW Bridge, or SAP BW/4HANA
  • Safeguard your SAP BW conversion with SAP Enterprise Support services
  • Learning Journey - SAP Extended Planning and Analysis (xP&A)
  • SAP Analytics Cloud - Deployment Readiness

entry.title: Re: SAC: hide stories shared by other users
entry.content: User has no option to clear or unshare the objects shared to him. I feel this might be only option for user to 'tidy up' this own private folder by using different views.

entry.title: Approval Query based on department and based on amount
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have a client that wants to customize the approval template based on this query but they want the system to be doing it in such a way that the amount will be in dollar between zero dollar to five thousand dollar  which is the system currency but the PO will be raised in Naira which is a local currency which will be in the same range in naira based on the exchange rate for that day.

This is a sample query that was written in naira but we want to rewrite it again such that when they raise the PO in naira it will pick the query which the amount is in dollar range.

SELECT CASE WHEN $[OPOR.U_UserDept] = 'ADD' AND CAST($[OPOR.Doctotal] as decimal(10,2)) < 1000001 THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END

entry.title: Re: Excel uploading error msg
entry.content:
Hi there Lucas and thank you for your feedback.

I'm using 64bit versions on both SAP and Office.

The problem started as I previously said when I bought new PCs for some of my employees. All of them have the same specs.
I guess i'll have to open a ticket to see what's going on.

I'll be back with some feedback from the support if I have any, just in case other people get helped.

entry.title: Where can I start learning AI-based Intelligent Selling Services for SAP Commerce Cloud?
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Enabling AI-Based Personalized Product Recommendation with Intelligent Selling Services for SAP Commerce Cloud learning jounrey.

Overview
This learning journey provides a comprehensive introduction to the AI-based Intelligent Selling Services for SAP Commerce Cloud. It aims to enhance the customer satisfaction, and create a more engaging, effective website by leveraging the power of built-in AI support.

Learning objectives
Upon completing the learning journey, learners will be able to:

  • Understand the functionalities, applications, and AI integration of Intelligent Selling Services for SAP Commerce Cloud.
  • Connect Intelligent Selling Services with SAP Commerce Cloud and Composable Storefront, including preparation and successful linking.
  • Construct and configure AI-based personalized product recommendations.
  • Utilize Monitoring and Reporting Support within Intelligent Selling Services for optimization and website improvement

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

The blog post is not talking about "5", nothing more to say about it, and that's why I answered.

entry.title: Re: How to check the reservation number and components pe...
entry.content: The CDS view I_MFGORDEROPERATIONCOMPONENT can be used to lookup the Reservation table to find the Production Order and BOM Number and then the CDS views available at CDS Views for Bill of Material can be used to lookup components involved

Manoel

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
Worth noting what BEx features are still not supported but are planned to be supported;

https://d.dam.sap.com/a/ww7vDHu/DevtoberfestBWMOVE.pdf?rc=10

(this is from 10/2023)

Planned

▪ Handling and reuse of hierarchies (Q1/2024)
▪ Non-Cumulative Key figures (Q2/2024)
▪ Constant selection (Q1/2024)
▪ Exit variables
▪ Multi-Structure (will be delivered in 3 Phases, manually already possible, via Cross calculation
▪ Unit Conversion
▪ Replacement path variables
▪ Conditions

Some key features in that list with no ETA on them.

Unsupported

▪ Temporal Join
▪ Ambiguous Join
▪ BADI Provider as PartProvider
▪ Open ODS View without calculation scenario

I assume most customers with a lot of queries using some of these features will stick with the hybrid approach until those gaps are closed.

entry.title: Re: Do we have a certificate for datasphere? thanks ~
entry.content: The SAP BW/4HANA courses have been updated last fall and will be updated this year. The datasphere courses are constantly updated every 2 weeks when new product features are shipped in line with the strategy communication from product management. Regarding certification, together with the new certification, we are currently update the courses as online learning journeys. This update process will continue.

entry.title: Re: hey team, can i know how to see the security events l...
entry.content: Example added for BU4 which contains the transaction code S000. I think that you didn't understand that the first four characters contain the variable length. In the second record, the terminal short name (right after the file number) has length 0008 which means that the next 8 characters contain the terminal short name, and the next field (user name) starts right after it. 0000 means "no value".

entry.title: Re: Weekday Funktion in SIGNAL?
entry.content:
Hi Niels,

If you want to add the information as e.g. an attribute in the Transformation (in Process Data Mgmt.) then please refer this documentation as it is not using SIGNAL:
https://trino.io/docs/current/functions/datetime.html?highlight=format_datetime#java-date-functions

SIGNAL is only used in the widgets within a process.

If you want to make your query work you need replace the column you are querying with the complete condition as 'Day_of_the_week' is just a string input and the column is not available within the same query.
You are literally comparing the string 'Day_of_the_week' with the string '3' which is never true.

entry.title: Re: hey team, can i know how to see the security events l...
entry.content: yahh i have no doubt regarding ur length explanation... one more question is what is offset?? does it defaultly has a length of 4?? and i waanna know does this fields like username,transaction code etc have static(predefined) length or it varies??

entry.title: Re: Steps to activate workflow and external notifications...
entry.content:
Hi,

To integrate SAP Alert Notification for SAP BTP with SAP BTP HANA, you'll need to set up the necessary subscription, action, and condition. Detailed instructions on configuring these components can be found at this link: Configuration Management using SAP BTP Cockpit.

For receiving notifications related to the HANA service, you can explore the supported scenarios through these links: SAP BTP HANA Service Events and SAP HANA Cloud Service Events, along with guidance on how to configure them.

Best,
Stoyan

entry.title: Re: SAP Smart Tree Control consuming CDS generated Odata
entry.content: Hello , Is this thread still relevant ?

entry.title: Re: hey team, can i know how to see the security events l...
entry.content: offset = number of characters from a given position (e.g. start of record). As I said and as you can see in the 3 records of my answer, that is a "variable length" so it varies.

entry.title: Re: [Extension]-Stock - Multiple Materials App [F1595] fo...
entry.content:
Hi, there are two ways to extend the application to meet your needs:

  1. The field you want to add is a SAP field but not included in the OData Service: To do this, you can use the Custom Fields app in the Fiori Launchpad and create a 'Data Source extension'. For the data source with the same name as the app:

    The field can then be added to the UI using "adapt ui". There is a blog post I can recommend that gives an example: Adding Field in standard Fiori apps of S/4HANA wit... - SAP Community
  2. The field you want to add is a real custom field (not from SAP) and not included in the OData Service: So you need to append the field to a database table (which depends on your field) or create a new database table. Then you need to extend the CDS view(s).
     F0_Mmim_Matstockquanvalbydate is the name of the CDS View which is used by the OData Service. Learn how to extend CDS views and apply database fields to them in this blog: Extending Transactional Fiori App based on Fiori E... - SAP Community  - The example is for transactional applications, but the extension process should work for analytical applications as well.
    You can add the fields to the UI using "adapt ui".

entry.title: Is it possible to remove unwanted printer output from the Output document list of the Sales Quote?
entry.content:
Is it possible to remove unwanted printer output from the Output document list of the Sales Quote?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to remove unwanted printer output from...
entry.content:
Hi

Deleting Output Files from the Output document list is currently not possible. However, you can remove the print output by accessing the Administration work center and going to the print queue view.

entry.title: SAP BTP - Ask Me Anything! On SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Exciting News Alert! Join us for a dynamic YouTube live session diving deep into the world of SAP HANA Cloud, the powerhouse multi-model database management system running on SAP BTP. Discover how its versatile capabilities empower you to craft and deploy intelligent data applications at scale.

 In this month’s episode, our esteemed product experts will be joining forces to unveil the latest advancements, including the groundbreaking Vector Engine! But that's not all - we're here to address all your burning questions and curiosities.

Get ready to engage and learn! Before the session, be sure to explore the SAP HANA Cloud community topic page to prime your mind and prepare your questions: https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/hana/cloud.

This is your chance to deepen your understanding and unlock the full potential of SAP HANA Cloud. See you there! 

 

Session Details: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-btp-ask-me-anything-monthly-series/ba-p/13582345

entry.title: Analysis for Office - Logon was successful - Loading Screen
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
We are working with SAP Analysis for Office and unfortunately some colleagues cannot log in or fetch data from the server. The following window appears and stays open all the time.

Has anyone ever had this problem and is there a solution?

External consultants have advised us to select the preferred platform, this setting has already been done, but this did not solve the problem.


Many thanks and best regards,
Lorenz

entry.title: What's with SAP BTP - Q1, 2024
entry.content:
🚀 Dive into the Future of Business Technology with Us! Join our exclusive YouTube Live session where we unveil the latest innovations delivered in Q1 2024 for SAP Business Technology Platform.

Curious about what's in store? Our seasoned product experts will guide you through each innovation, offering live product demos and illustrating how these advancements translate into tangible benefits.

 In this session, we're shining a spotlight on the game-changing new vector engine in SAP HANA Cloud, the launch of the generative AI hub in SAP AI Core, and the eagerly awaited general availability of SAP Build Code. 

But wait, there's more! Don't miss out on exploring other groundbreaking innovations in our Road Map Explorer for a sneak peek into the future of enterprise technology. Mark your calendars and join us for an unforgettable journey into innovation! #SAPBTP#InnovationUnleashed #YouTubeLive https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUC... We look forward to seeing you!! 😀

 

tails: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/what-s-new-with-sap-btp-quarterly-live-series/ba-p/13573499

entry.title: Webdynpro 500 Error:Node COMPONENTCONTROLLER HUIPIAO Specified in the Mapping Is Unknown
entry.content:

I select line 1 and click button A, will pop up a list dialog, is ok , but when i close the dialog, select line 2 and click the same button A , it dump. I try to debug find the huipiao nodes LEAD_SELECTION is inital .I do not why. please save my life ....🤣

"HUIPIAO" is the popup dialog

entry.title: Re: Client Export Process- Production Client Data using DSM tool / EPI-USE method
entry.content:
Hi,

For complete non-production environments refreshes (full client copies) with client sync, How do you maintain data integrity between ALL SAP inter-dependent Systems (e.g S/4 HANA, CRM and BW)?

  • Please explain in detail the procedure to follow.
  • At the end of system refresh with client sync (full client copies), Do we need to execute tasks to retrieve delta of data since we submit the refresh in order to maintain data integrity between the systems? If yes, please explain the steps we should execute.

In my case, the source system is the production system and we cannot lock all user and stop background processes.

Thank you for your answer

entry.title: Re: Manage Equipment connectivity
entry.content:
Hi Rahul,

Thanks a lot for the help. It helps a lot. That means we dont have to use Equipment related connectivity at all. 

KR,
Sayuj.

entry.title: SAP Plant Connectivity wont connect to KepServerEX
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am Running SAP Plant Connectivity Version 15.5.4.39 as a OPC-UA Client and KEPServerEX 6 as an OPC-UA Server. They are both on a Different VM but they are in the same Subnet. Now whenever I am trying to connect my SAP PCo to the KepServer I get the Error: "Error establishing a connection: BadNotConnect". I've had this error before but was able to solve it by adding the Port of the KepServer behind the IP or Hostname of the Server on wich KepServer is installed. (like this [HOSTNAME]:[PORT]). The two servers can Ping each other so I dont think that it is a Connectivity Issue. 

Are there maybe any Settings I have to make in order to get it to work? 

Thank you for answers. 

With kind regards.

entry.title: Re: You can deactivate the VPRS (hide) by un-checking the...
entry.content:
I believe deactivating the Determine Cost indicator in Item Category definition (VOV7) will stop determination of Cost for the Item in Sales Document pricing. 

However the other functions where Cost Price of Material is needed (for example to determine COGS (Cost of Goods Sold), the Cost will still be determined based on settings in Material Master (Standard Price or Moving Average Price). 

Thanks,

entry.title: Retrieve return invoices to other tills e.g. directly from SAP CCO Manager
entry.content:
We have following problem. Our customer has SAP CCO Manager, several stores, several tills and all using as ERP System SAP BusinessOne.
One Till (lets called till_1) from store xy can NOT RETRIEVE any invoices from a certain period. That is a problem when you have return invoices and you not find invoices in till.

Now the question is: Is there a possibility to retrieve/recall receipts that have been created in till_1 to another till, lets say till_2 ? (independent of local database of till_1 where invoices originally created). So, is it possible to return invoices to all other tills regardless of where it was originally created e.g. directly from the SAP CCO Manager ?

Prod. environment: We have installed FP16, SAP Customer Checkout manager is the back-end system, Central Receipt Management is activated. All receipts posted in SAP Customer Checkout are sent to SAP Customer Checkout manager. B1 using as ERP System.

Thank you for your support and knowledge sharing!

Rozbeh

entry.title: Re: Putaway Process - Put 1 or more HUs in a Final bin
entry.content: Okay.. Thanks . Could you confirm what settings SAP recommends in case customer wants to keep multiple HUs in single bin for same product / batch combination

entry.title: Re: pessimistic lock in custom RAP based application(ODat...
entry.content:
The lock will be checked automatically as soon you go into the EDIT mode . There could 2 scenario here 

1. Managed App : If you are using managed app , the lock check will be handle by framework and it will give                                     you generic error " You can't edit this instance at the moment. It's currently locked.".

2. Unmanaged App : In your example , Manage Sales Order Version 2 i.e. an Unmanaged app , the lock                                           check has to be handled explicitly by custom logic in the lock method . You need to                                           throw the error by filling up the Failed and Reported Structure and it will be shown                                             automatically on the screen .

BDEF : R_SALESORDERTP

entry.title: Re: SAP Plant Connectivity wont connect to KepServerEX
entry.content:
Hi,
Normally the PCo should be installed in the same server of the Machine or Kepware. 
1. But you could first try to open the port of the VM where Kepware is installed.
2. Also check the whether the authorization is done properly between PCo and Kepware. To check this you can see the user authorization in Kepware and also check the certificate in the rejected certificates of Kepware. 

 

Please check the above config.

KR,
Say.

But I will look into your first Suggestion.

entry.title: Re: pessimistic lock in custom RAP based application(ODat...
entry.content: Hi Amit,

entry.title: Re: pessimistic lock in custom RAP based application(ODat...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Please review the Business Definition (BDEF) of the R_SalesOrderTP in SAP RAP. Look for the keyword 'lock master'.

To gain a better understanding, insert a breakpoint within the behavior class's lock method."

Regards,

Pradeep.

entry.title: Unlock the potential of DevOps on SAP BTP with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
🔓 Unlock the Power of DevOps with SAP BTP and SAP Cloud ALM! Join us for an enlightening YouTube live session where we'll show you how these services work in tandem to unleash the full potential of your development processes and pave the way for a comprehensive DevOps setup.

In this session, we'll delve into how SAP BTP services seamlessly integrate with SAP Cloud ALM to streamline your agile workflows, enhancing efficiency and agility throughout your development lifecycle.

Whether you're a seasoned developer or new to DevOps methodologies, our expert speakers will guide you through practical insights and best practices to help you harness the transformative power of DevOps and Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD), also in enterprise environments.

Don't miss this opportunity to elevate your development game and accelerate innovation within your organization. Tune in and embark on the journey towards a more agile and collaborative future! 🚀💻 #CI/CD #DevOps #SAPBTP #SAPCloudALM #YouTubeLive

 

Registration link: https://url.sap/bvqi9g

entry.title: excel to itab in rap
entry.content: Can anyone share RAP based code for uploading an excel file and then reading the data in an itab so that it is updated to custom DB table from this internal table. Need only RAP code without any extensions on UI. I have an idea that this can be achieved using large object handling as step 1 to first upload the file in xstring format, and then read the file in xstring format to convert to itab using XCO library. Has anyone implemented this and can share the exact code? Thank you !

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM for SAP BTP Operations
entry.content:
In this session, we will provide an general overview of the existing and planned coverage for SAP BTP based SaaS and PaaS services with SAP Cloud ALM. We will provide a short overview regarding SAP Cloud ALM, introduce OpenTelemetry @ SAP as well as provide you with the existing support for the different SAP BTP use cases.

 

Registration link: https://url.sap/bvqi9g

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP application with custom action not working
entry.content: Yes , Indeed you can not update Key fields . But you can try one workaround if it is really needed, delete the exiting entry and create the entry with your new values.

entry.title: Re: SAP Plant Connectivity wont connect to KepServerEX
entry.content: Allright thank you for the Solution.

entry.title: Re: SAP Plant Connectivity wont connect to KepServerEX
entry.content: Allright thank you for the answer. Opening the Port was the Solution to the Problem. Have a Nice Day. Kind Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - Deployed HTML5 Web App
entry.content:
I'm experiencing the same issues, i have sent an email with a support request to buildapps@sap.com

We will also create a support ticket.

Last time SAP suggested to enable IAS in Work Zone, maybe this blog is helpful for you: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-blog-posts/what-s-new-for-sap-build-apps-enhanced-fusion-development/ba-p/13591981

After the first time we encountered the internal server error regarding the missing zone info, we added the application to workzone and access to the app was restored by accessing it through there. Now the internal server error also appears over there, but now it states "completed with status 500 Failed to exchange login token by an XSUAA token undefined"

Please let me know if you have a solution for this problem.

entry.title: Re: How to get Service/instance name
entry.content:
Hi, 

Since we are not experts on how the BTP CLI operates, we are unable to provide you with precise information on how the command "btp --format json get services/instance" retrieves the display name from the catalog. We do not have ownership of this BTP client. For further clarification and information, I recommend reaching out to the appropriate team responsible for developing and maintaining this client. They should be able to provide you with the necessary insights and assistance regarding its functionalities.

Best,
Stoyan

entry.title: Re: Cannot retrieve session with VBA
entry.content:
Hi,

apart from the question whether you have activated SAP GUI Scripting at all (see the other answers) I wonder whether you have a session at all at the time you run your script.

This command
Set session = Connection.Children(0)
can only work if you have opened a connection from SAP Logon.
SAP Logon itself does not have a scripting API - the API is basically only available for the main windows belonging to a connection and their children. Connection is the object which contains all available connections - if you have none, you will get the respective error.

If the later is the problem I advise that you first check the scripting API documentation.

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Re: Download internal table data in XLSX from ABAP

entry.title: Merging Customer & Vendor into single BP
entry.content:
Hello,

During CVI pre-conversion activity on ECC/ERP system, If we want to merge customers and vendors into single BP which are having same legal entity (address) then in customization path do we need to assign customer & vendor account group to the same BP Grouping? Not all customers & vendors from those account groups are eligible to merge into single BP.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Easy way to create APIs in SAP using standard classes
entry.content: Hello I tried this guide and created an API but I'm getting following error in postman and a dump in ST22

entry.title: Re: Architecture Decisions for Transfer Price Management Capability
entry.content: Hi Mo, just wanted to add that many companies use transfer prices in SAP without both of the above solution options, that is, without parallel valuation and without PaPM. Just modeling an IC sales process with a price condition such as cost plus IC surcharge gives you already transfer pricing. Above solutions just add transparency for reporting and controlling  (parallel valuation) or planning and simulation capabilities (PaPM).

entry.title: Re: S/4 Public Cloud CBC:Event-Based Revenue Recognition...
entry.content:
Currently, in standard support is  provided for manual loss handling for EPPM projects, as indicated by usage 301. This allows you to manually record the imminent loss reserves for the onerous projects, using the maintained accounts in the SSCUI. You can enter your imminent loss reserves manually via the feature Manual Accruals in the app Event-Based Revenue Recognition - Projects. 

In the upcoming releases, we plan to introduce an automatic imminent loss handling process for EPPM projects. This future enhancement will provide an automatic calculation and posting of imminent loss reserves for EPPM projects using the cost-based POC method and revenue-based POC method. The underlying usage for this is usage 300.

entry.title: Re: What a customer COE needs to know about the transition to SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: @Kim_Heckscher Happy to hear! 👍

Regards,

Ragavie

entry.title: Re: hey team, can i know how to see the security events l...
entry.content: As I said: "I only deduced the format from the file and SM20 display". If you need more information, ask the developers of this feature directly. In case you ask, I don't know who they are. The whole question would deserve asking the blog post author.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build App After Deployed into BTP getting Error w...
entry.content:
In Februari I received the following resolution for this issue. Maybe it helps..

I'm sorry to hear that you are having this type of issue.
Please note that we released in the last days a better integration to SAP Build Workzone.
Therefore it's necessary to do some changes es described in the following blog post under chapter "Deploying a project with backend to SAP Build Work Zone"  https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-blog-posts/what-s-new-for-sap-build-apps-enhanced-fusion-development/ba-p/13591981 
You can find the description of the needed steps also in our documentation:  Visual cloud functions - Deployed Applications 

Please note that these changes are required even if you don't use a project with the Visual Cloud feature or SAP Build Work Zone!
The SAP Build Apps are deployed to the SAP Build Work Zone managed approuter and therefore these changes are needed.

entry.title: Re: process detail in SLT
entry.content: Please anyone assist here?
